feat.name: Ferrousoul
feat.text: Whether in their pure elemental forms or as part of an alloy such as steel, the elemental metal in your soul resonates strongly with iron, bronze, and other sturdy, practical metals suitable for weaponry. Your fist attacks gain the modular B, P, or S trait and lose the nonlethal trait. Your fist's damage die increases to 1d6.

traits.name: Lineage
traits.text: A feat with this trait indicates a character’s descendance from a particular type of creature. You can have only one lineage feat. You can select a lineage feat only at 1st level, and you can’t retrain into or out of these feats.

traits.name: Talos
traits.text: Taloses are planar scions descended from zuhras.
